PushButton.Name: Open
PushButton.Help: Open a previously saved test result or logbook

PushButton.Name: Save
PushButton.Help: Saves the most recent test result

PushButton.Name: Print
PushButton.Help: Prints the most recent test result

RadioButton.Name: OQPVBtn
RadioButton.Help: Load possible OQ/PV failures into the symptoms list.

RadioButton.Name: AnalytBtn
RadioButton.Help: Load possible analytical problems into the symptoms list.

NonEditCombobox.Name: SymptomSelect
NonEditCombobox.Help: Select a symptom, to load possible defects into cause list.

NonEditCombobox.Name: CauseSelect
NonEditCombobox.Help: Select defect cause to be evaluated on cause confirmation pad
